title: pilosella praealta subsp. stellata
intro: Pilosella praealta subsp. stellata, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella praealta plant, is a perennial herb in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. Pilosella praealta subsp. stellata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as dried and used in capsule or tablet form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety. However, some herbalists and traditional practitioners report that the plant's preparations can help to soothe digestive issues and support the immune system.
